# Khelnedo Games

> Khelnedo Games is a game development studio that creates premium brain training puzzle games for Android.

## Sudoku Spark — Play & Learn

Sudoku Spark is a free brain training puzzle game for Android, available on the Google Play Store.

- **Developer:** Khelnedo Games
- **Platform:** Android (Google Play Store)
- **Price:** Free (ad-supported)
- **Package:** com.worldclass.sudoku
- **Download:** https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.worldclass.sudoku
- **Website:** https://khelnedogames.com/sudoku-spark/

### Key Features
- Daily Sudoku challenges (new puzzle every day, same for all players worldwide)
- 4 difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, Hard, Expert
- Smart Hints that explain solving techniques (Naked Singles, Hidden Pairs, X-Wing, etc.)
- Offline play (no internet required)
- Auto-save progress
- 30+ achievements across Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Diamond tiers
- Detailed per-difficulty statistics (win rate, best time, average time)
- Notes mode (pencil marks) for candidate tracking
- Unlimited undo and redo
- Duplicate number highlighting
- Premium themes: Light, Dark, Soft
- Victory card sharing to social media

### Brain Training Benefits
Playing Sudoku daily improves logical thinking, concentration, pattern recognition, and working memory. Sudoku requires pure logic — no math or guessing needed.

### Difficulty Levels Explained
- Easy: 36-45 givens, solvable with basic scanning and Naked Singles
- Medium: 30-35 givens, requires Hidden Singles and basic elimination
- Hard: 25-29 givens, demands Naked Pairs, Pointing Pairs, Box/Line Reduction
- Expert: 22-26 givens, requires X-Wing, Swordfish, advanced chain techniques

- Sudoku Tips & Strategies (15 techniques): https://khelnedogames.com/sudoku-spark/tips-and-strategies/
